all.en: This guide explains common tax deductions available to employees.
all.zh: 本指南說明員工常見可申報之節稅項目。

all.en: Tax planning is an important part of personal financial wellness.
all.zh: 稅務規劃為個人理財健康之重要環節。

all.en: Retirement contributions remain one of the most powerful deductions.
all.zh: 退休帳戶提撥仍是最具效益的扣除項目之一。

all.en: Traditional retirement accounts may lower taxable income immediately.
all.zh: 傳統退休帳戶可即時降低應稅所得。

all.en: Roth contributions grow tax free but do not reduce current taxes.
all.zh: 羅斯帳戶提撥免稅成長但不降低當期稅負。

all.en: Health savings account deposits offer triple tax advantages.
all.zh: 健康儲蓄帳戶存款具有三重稅務優勢。

all.en: Flexible spending account funds must be used within the plan year.
all.zh: 彈性消費帳戶資金須於方案年度內使用。

all.en: Dependent care contributions can reduce taxable income meaningfully.
all.zh: 受扶養者照護提撥可有效降低應稅所得。

all.en: Charitable donations are deductible when properly documented.
all.zh: 慈善捐款於妥善存證後可列舉扣除。

all.en: Cash donations require written acknowledgement from the charity.
all.zh: 現金捐款須取得慈善機構出具之書面證明。

all.en: Donated goods should be valued at fair market estimates.
all.zh: 捐贈物品應以公允市價估算。

all.en: Mortgage interest on a primary residence may be deductible.
all.zh: 自用住宅之房貸利息可能可列扣除。

all.en: State and local tax deductions are subject to current statutory caps.
all.zh: 州與地方稅扣除受現行法定上限限制。

all.en: Student loan interest payments may qualify for an above the line deduction.
all.zh: 學貸利息支出可能符合上線扣除資格。

all.en: Educator expenses up to a defined limit are also deductible.
all.zh: 教育工作者支出於額度內亦可扣除。

all.en: Home office deductions apply when space is used exclusively for work.
all.zh: 居家辦公室扣除適用於專用於工作之空間。

all.en: Unreimbursed work expenses are generally not deductible for employees.
all.zh: 員工未獲補助之工作支出一般不可扣除。

all.en: Keep receipts and digital records organized throughout the year.
all.zh: 請全年整理保存收據與電子紀錄。

all.en: A tax professional can help identify situation specific opportunities.
all.zh: 稅務專業人員可協助發掘個別情況之節稅機會。

all.en: Avoid relying on rumors or social media tax advice.
all.zh: 請勿依賴傳言或社群媒體上的稅務建議。

all.en: Filing deadlines should be tracked carefully to avoid penalties.
all.zh: 申報期限應妥善追蹤以避免罰款。

all.en: Use this guide as a starting point for your annual tax planning.
all.zh: 請以本指南作為年度稅務規劃之起點。

all.en: Estimated tax payments help self employed contractors avoid year end balance surprises.
all.zh: 預估稅款繳納有助於自雇承包人員避免年底稅負突增。

all.en: Capital gains realized on long held investments receive preferential tax treatment.
all.zh: 長期持有投資所實現之資本利得享有優惠稅率。

all.en: Wash sale rules can disallow loss recognition on quickly repurchased securities.
all.zh: 洗售規則可能否定迅速回購之證券所實現之虧損。

all.en: Adoption credits may offset qualified expenses up to the annual cap.
all.zh: 領養抵減可於年度上限內抵銷合格支出。

all.en: Energy efficiency upgrades to your home may unlock additional federal credits.
all.zh: 住宅節能升級可能取得額外之聯邦抵減。

all.en: Foreign earned income exclusions apply to qualifying expatriate work arrangements.
all.zh: 外國勞務所得排除適用於符合資格之外派工作安排。

all.en: Underpayment penalties accrue when withholding falls below safe harbor thresholds.
all.zh: 扣繳金額低於安全港門檻時將累計補繳罰款。

all.en: Records of business mileage should be logged contemporaneously throughout the year.
all.zh: 業務里程紀錄應於全年同步即時登錄。

all.en: Review prior year returns to identify deductions that may have been overlooked.
all.zh: 檢視往年申報資料以辨識可能遺漏之扣除項目。

all.en: Consult with a qualified advisor before implementing significant tax strategies.
all.zh: 執行重大稅務策略前請先諮詢合格顧問。

all.en: Quarterly estimated payments help self employed individuals avoid year end balance surprises.
all.zh: 季度預估繳稅有助於自雇者避免年底稅負突增。

all.en: Standard deduction amounts are adjusted annually for inflation by federal authorities.
all.zh: 標準扣除額由聯邦主管機關每年依通膨調整。

all.en: Itemized deductions become beneficial when total qualifying expenses exceed standard thresholds.
all.zh: 當合格支出總額超過標準扣除門檻時，列舉扣除將更為有利。

all.en: Health flexible spending account elections cannot be changed mid year without qualifying events.
all.zh: 健康彈性消費帳戶之選擇若無符合資格之事件不得於年中變更。

all.en: Dependent care credits offer additional savings for working parents with young children.
all.zh: 受扶養者照護抵減為有幼兒之在職父母提供額外節稅優惠。

all.en: Real estate tax payments made before year end may accelerate available deductions.
all.zh: 年底前繳納之不動產稅可使可用扣除提前實現。

all.en: Documentation requirements include dates, amounts, and business purposes for each transaction.
all.zh: 文件要求包含每筆交易之日期、金額與商業目的。

all.en: Electronic filing typically results in faster refund processing than paper submissions.
all.zh: 電子申報通常較紙本申報能更快取得退稅。

all.en: Identity protection personal identification numbers reduce risks of fraudulent tax filings.
all.zh: 身分保護個人識別碼可降低詐騙性稅務申報之風險。

all.en: Tax planning conversations should begin early rather than just before filing deadlines.
all.zh: 稅務規劃對話應提早展開而非僅於申報期限前進行。

all.en: Honestly, I keep a shoebox for every paper receipt and a phone folder for every digital one all year long.
all.zh: 老實說我整年都用一個鞋盒收紙本收據，再用手機資料夾收電子收據。

all.en: My CPA friend told me that lazy record keeping costs people more in lost deductions than they realize.
all.zh: 我做會計師的朋友說，紀錄做得隨便讓人錯失的扣除額比想像中多很多。

all.en: Don't fall for tax shortcuts you read on social media, the IRS is honestly smarter than those posts.
all.zh: 別相信社群媒體上看到的節稅捷徑，老實說國稅局比那些貼文聰明多了。

all.en: I maxed out my health savings account contribution last year and it really softened the tax bill in April.
all.zh: 去年我把健康儲蓄帳戶提撥到上限，四月繳稅時真的輕鬆很多。

all.en: Honestly, donating gently used clothes to a local charity feels great and the deduction is a nice bonus.
all.zh: 老實說把還能穿的衣服捐給在地慈善機構感覺很棒，順便節稅算是額外的小驚喜。

all.en: Be sure to track your business miles in real time, since reconstructing them in March is honestly a nightmare.
all.zh: 業務里程要即時記錄，到三月才回頭整理老實說是場惡夢。

all.en: My neighbor missed the student loan interest deduction for years just because she never checked her form.
all.zh: 我鄰居好幾年漏掉學貸利息扣除，就只是因為從來沒檢查過自己的表單。

all.en: Don't wait until April to call your tax professional, the good ones are fully booked by mid March.
all.zh: 別等到四月才打給稅務專員，厲害的早在三月中就被預約滿了。

all.en: I keep a sticky note on my fridge listing every deductible expense I want to remember throughout the year.
all.zh: 我冰箱上會貼一張便利貼，列出整年想記得的每項可扣除支出。

all.en: Honestly, getting an unexpected refund check feels like finding twenty dollars in an old jacket pocket.
all.zh: 老實說收到意外的退稅支票，感覺就像在舊外套口袋找到二十塊錢。
